auth.error_invalid_token: Invalid token. Please check the token in the HAANA logs.
auth.standalone_hint: Find the admin token in the HAANA logs on first start (Supervisor → Logs). It starts with 'HAANA Admin Token: ...'.

chat.placeholder: Message to HAANA... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.rebuild_banner: Qdrant is empty – memory can be rebuilt from conversation logs.
chat.no_conversations_instance: No conversations for this instance yet.
chat.select_instance: Select an instance to use chat

logs.delete_confirm: Really delete {scope}? This cannot be undone!

config.restart_prompt: The following changes require an agent restart:
config.restart_warning: On restart, the current sliding window will be extracted to memory. The conversation context will be lost.
config.restart_pending: Restart pending – changes will only take effect after manual restart
config.restart_changes_intro: The following changes require a restart:
config.restart_changes_warning: On restart, the sliding window will be extracted to memory. The conversation context will be lost.

config_llm.title: LLM Configuration
config_llm.name: Name
config_llm.min_one_slot: At least one slot must exist
config_llm.min_one_llm: At least one LLM must exist

config_provider.title: Provider Configuration
config_provider.name: Name
config_provider.delete_blocked_detail: Please remove or reassign these LLMs first:
config_provider.min_one_provider: At least one provider must exist
config_provider.type_immutable: Type cannot be changed after creation
config_provider.oauth_api_key_placeholder: sk-ant-api03-... (OAuth not supported for Messages API)

config_memory.embedding_warning: Changing the embedding model requires rebuilding all Qdrant collections (different dimensions are not compatible).
config_memory.context_enrichment_hint: Resolves pronouns and references before extraction (extra LLM call per message). Recommended only for capable models (e.g. MiniMax, Claude Haiku). May produce errors with small models.
config_memory.context_window_hint: Number of messages before and after the current message included during extraction. More context helps with corrections and references, but costs more tokens.
config_memory.rebuild_desc: Rebuilds Qdrant completely – useful after data loss or embedding model change. Conversation logs are the source of truth.
config_memory.rebuild_warning: May take minutes to hours depending on conversation count and LLM speed.
config_memory.rebuild_skip_trivial_hint: Short commands (lights, status, hello) are not processed
config_memory.rebuild_delay_hint: ms – higher = slower, but less API load
config_memory.embedding_changed_body:
The embedding model has been changed.
Existing Qdrant collections are incompatible with the new model and need to be rebuilt.

Without a rebuild, memory search will not work correctly.
config_memory.embed_local_hint: No external service needed. Model downloaded on first use.

config_services.mcp_token_hint: same token as HA REST API
config_services.mcp_info_builtin: Built-in MCP Server since HA 2025.1. Enable in HA under Settings → Integrations → Model Context Protocol Server. Basic tools: turn on/off, light control, status queries.
config_services.mcp_info_extended: ha-mcp add-on provides 89 tools: entity control, automations, dashboards, calendars, todo lists, HACS, history, backups and more. Install via HA Add-on Store.
config_services.stt_tts_desc: Speech-to-Text and Text-to-Speech via Home Assistant. Entities are loaded automatically from HA.
config_services.tts_voice_info: Find Nabu Casa voices in the HA app under Settings → Voice Assistants → TTS. Empty = default voice.
config_services.tts_also_text: Also send reply as text (alongside voice message)
config_services.wa_scan_qr: Scan QR code with WhatsApp (Linked Devices → Link a Device):
config_services.wa_mode_desc: Global mode for the WhatsApp bridge. Per user, only the phone number is configured (incoming message routing).
config_services.wa_disconnect_confirm: Really disconnect WhatsApp session? You will need to scan the QR code again.
config_services.auto_backup_label: Automatic HA backup before agent changes
config_services.auto_backup_desc: Creates a Home Assistant backup before the agent modifies automations, scripts or other HA configurations.
config_services.claude_auth_desc: Claude Code Agent SDK requires a valid OAuth session. The token must be renewed periodically.
config_services.auth_upload_hint: Paste the contents of ~/.claude/.credentials.json from a logged-in Claude Code session.
config_services.auth_apikey_desc: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in the LLM slot. No expiry, no OAuth needed. Recommended for HA add-on (no shell access required).
config_services.oauth_login_desc: OAuth login directly from the admin interface. Click "Start login", open the link, authorize and enter the code here.

config_logs.retention_desc: Conversation logs are never deleted (source of truth for memory rebuild). Operational logs (LLM calls, tools, memory) are cleaned up after configurable days.
config_logs.anonymizer_desc: Removes personal data from logs before they are saved.
config_logs.dream_process_desc: Nightly consolidation: conversations are condensed into lasting memories and linked.

config_planned.ha_subs_desc: Real-time subscriptions to HA events (doorbell, motion sensors, …). The agent is proactively notified.
config_planned.backup_desc: Automatic backup of Qdrant collections to TrueNAS (SMB).

users.title: User Management
users.delete_confirm: Really delete user "{name}"? Container will be stopped and removed.

status.qdrant_restart_confirm: Restart Qdrant? Running operations will be interrupted.
status.force_stop_confirm:
Force stop {instance} (SIGKILL)?

WARNING: Running memory extraction will be lost – conversation logs are preserved.
status.delete_collection_confirm:
Permanently delete collection "{name}"?

Memory rebuild required for affected instances afterwards.
status.dims_mismatch: Embedding dimensions mismatch – collections need to be rebuilt (Memory tab).
status.rebuild_banner: Qdrant is empty – memory can be rebuilt from conversation logs.

whatsapp.disconnected: WhatsApp disconnected – QR code will appear shortly
whatsapp.disconnect_confirm: Really disconnect WhatsApp session? You will need to scan the QR code again.

common.delete_confirm_refs: Delete anyway? Affected agents will be shut down.

log_editor.title: Log Editor
log_editor.hint: Each line is a JSON object (one conversation). Remove or edit lines, then save.

wizard.title: Set up HAANA
wizard.step1_title: Which AI services do you want to use?
wizard.step1_desc: Add at least one AI provider and test the connection. HAANA requires at least one working provider.
wizard.step2_desc: Who uses HAANA? Configure household members and system agents.
wizard.step3_desc: These features are optional and can be changed at any time later.
wizard.at_least_one: At least one provider must work
wizard.embedding_local_desc: No external service needed. The embedding model is downloaded on first start.
wizard.no_providers_yet: No providers yet. Click '+ Add provider'.
wizard.ha_users_desc: These people were found in Home Assistant:
wizard.ha_users_manual: Enter the name of your first assistant:
wizard.ha_not_reachable: Home Assistant not reachable – please enter name manually
wizard.ha_assist_desc: Fast voice assistant for real-time control (lights, timers, scenes). Recommended: small, fast model.
wizard.ha_advanced_desc: For complex, non-time-critical tasks (research, planning, analysis). Recommended: large, capable model.
wizard.extraction_llm_desc: Extracts facts from conversations. Automatically set to a cheap model.
wizard.extraction_auto_desc: Processes conversations and permanently extracts important information into memory.
wizard.no_models_available: No models – test a provider first
wizard.voice_desc: How to connect HAANA as a voice assistant in Home Assistant:
wizard.voice_guide_intro: How to set up HAANA as a voice assistant in Home Assistant:
wizard.voice_step1: In Home Assistant: Settings → Voice Assistants → Add assistant
wizard.voice_step4: Choose model: ha-assist, ha-advanced or your user name
wizard.mcp_extended_detected: Extended MCP detected and enabled ({count} tools)
wizard.mcp_builtin: Built-in MCP active (6 tools). For more smart home control:
wizard.mcp_detected_desc: The ha-mcp add-on is installed. HAANA can use extended HA control (89 tools).
wizard.mcp_not_detected: ha-mcp add-on not found. Optional for extended Home Assistant control.
wizard.mcp_select_hint: No MCP add-on detected automatically. Please select manually if available:
wizard.pipeline_desc: Select an existing HA voice assistant whose STT/TTS settings HAANA should adopt.
wizard.dream_desc: Nightly memory consolidation and diary. Recommended.
wizard.complete_desc: Your assistant is set up. Start a conversation!
wizard.done_desc: Setup is complete. You can now chat with HAANA.
wizard.restart_extend_desc: Add more providers, users or LLMs
wizard.restart_fresh_desc: Reset everything and start from scratch
wizard.restart_fresh_warning: Warning: All providers, users and LLMs will be deleted!
wizard.api_key_replace_placeholder: Enter new key (leave empty = keep unchanged)
wizard.provider_retest_title: Optional: re-test connection and reload models
wizard.provider_auth_choose: How do you want to connect?
wizard.provider_auth_oauth_desc: Connect for free with your Claude.ai account
wizard.oauth_error: Connection failed. Try again or use API Key.

terminal.hint_claude: Tip: type 'claude' to start Claude Code

status_hints.no_provider: No LLM provider configured. Go to Config > Providers.
status_hints.no_users: No users created yet. Create your first assistant.
status_hints.agents_offline: Agents are not started. Start them in the Users tab.
